## 🎨 Style: Code Formatting
Non-logic changes (whitespace, formatting, imports).

### 📝 Description
Cleaning up code style to match project standards.

### 🛠️ Changes Details
- Reordered imports in Controllers.
- Removed unused comments.
- Fixed indentation using `laravel/pints`.

### ✅ Verification
- [ ] Application builds without errors (`php artisan optimize:clear`).
- [ ] All automated tests passed (`php artisan test`) on local environment.
- [ ] Verified on local environment.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (if applicable).
